hub-shell-detector.evidence: Reviewed Sales hub pages including src/pages/sales/SalesDashboard.tsx, src/pages/sales/ProposalBuilder.tsx, src/pages/sales/RevenueAnalytics.tsx; all have live data hooks and non-shell states per CLAUDE §7.

live-demo-detector.evidence: Sales surfaces show LIVE vs DEMO labeling consistent with Intelligence patterns; no unlabeled mock arrays found in Sales components.

cta-validator.evidence: Primary CTAs on SalesDashboard, ProposalBuilder, and DealDetail reinforce intelligence-first flows; no commerce-first CTAs on intelligence surfaces.

route-mapper.evidence: Sales routes (/sales, /sales/proposals, /sales/deals/:id, /portal/sales) align with GLOBAL_SITE_MAP and have bidirectional navigation with no orphaned pages.

accessibility-checker.evidence: Key Sales pages expose headings, landmark roles, and labeled buttons/links; no obvious keyboard traps or missing labels on primary actions.

error-state-enforcer.evidence: Sales data surfaces use shared ErrorState component or equivalent patterns to show retryable errors on failed queries.

loading-skeleton-enforcer.evidence: Sales listings and detail pages use Skeleton-based loading states for TanStack Query transitions, avoiding blank screens or layout jumps.

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Sales pipeline metrics depend on consistent joins between deals, proposals, and market_signals-derived attribution.
AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.query_or_function: RevenueAnalytics aggregate query (deals with signal_id IS NOT NULL)

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Cross-hub attribution for Sales depends on signal_id FKs being present and enforced.
Intelligence channels rail must stay in sync with market_signals vertical/topic contracts.
Actionable signals queue powers Sales tasks; stale or missing updated_at weakens prioritization.
Feed health telemetry must stay accurate so Sales dashboards never show obviously stale intelligence.
CRM contact records with churn_risk_score feed directly into Sales re-engagement flows.
AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.query_or_function: CRM rebooking and risk surfaces joined on contact_id

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Education CE credits influence Sales upsell and proof-of-value for providers.
Procurement dashboard requires consistent supplier and inventory data to avoid misleading intelligence on stock-outs.
AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.query_or_function: ProcurementDashboard aggregate queries over procurement_* tables

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Affiliate clicks must be reliably stored for downstream revenue attribution in Sales reports.
AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.query_or_function: Joins between affiliate_clicks and orders on session or referral keys

AGENT_17_dataset_integrity.description: Signal detail pages need consistent provenance fields to support Sales conversations about data quality.

FE_template_auditor.description: Shared EmptyState component should be the default for list/table empties across Sales and CRM.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Allow Sales-specific copy and icons while keeping Pearl Mineral tokens and spacing scale.

FE_template_auditor.description: Shared ErrorState component should be wired to all Sales data surfaces.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Customize titles/descriptions per hub but keep retry patterns and button hierarchy.

FE_template_auditor.description: Skeleton loading component should be preferred over spinners for Sales dashboards and tables.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Adjust skeleton shapes for cards vs rows while preserving animation and color tokens.

FE_template_auditor.description: StatCard pattern should be reused for Sales KPIs to avoid bespoke metrics tiles.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Permit icon and metric label swaps; keep card chrome and typography consistent.

FE_template_auditor.description: PageLayoutBuilder in CMS admin should guide new Sales/CRM layouts rather than bespoke grids.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Extend with additional slots but keep base column system and responsive breakpoints.

FE_template_auditor.description: Shared Modal component should wrap proposal and deal modals to keep keyboard/a11y behavior consistent.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Sales-specific widths and titles allowed; avoid custom focus traps.

FE_template_auditor.description: SeoHead helper should be used on Sales top-level routes to avoid missing meta tags.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Override title/description per page but keep canonical/OG patterns.

FE_template_auditor.description: Shared CTA button variants should be used for primary/secondary actions in Sales flows.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Text labels and icons may change; color and size variants must follow design tokens.

FE_template_auditor.description: Global navigation components should own entry points into Sales, not per-page hero buttons.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Add Sales nav links but keep intelligence-first ordering and IA.

FE_template_auditor.description: Shared table component should be preferred over bespoke tables for Sales pipelines.
FE_template_auditor.safe_deviation: Allow column-level customization and per-row actions while preserving header, row, and hover styles.

Journey_QA_specialist.issue_or_risk: Dashboard must link clearly into ProposalBuilder and DealDetail without dead-end widgets.
All ProposalBuilder states (draft, error, saved) must route back to SalesDashboard and DealDetail.
Revenue analytics views should deep-link into deals and source signals so users can investigate anomalies.
Benchmark dashboard historically shell-like; ensure live data, empty/error/loading states, and clear return paths to core hub.
Locations dashboard must never strand users; every drill-down should have visible navigation back.
CE credit journeys must connect Education completion back into CRM and Sales follow-up flows.
Portal IntelligenceHub should steer users into concrete actions (CRM tasks, proposals) instead of stopping at charts.
Brand Intelligence Hub must expose DEMO/LIVE labels and routes into brand campaigns and product updates.
Course completion CTAs should send users to certificates and relevant Sales/CRM follow-ups without dead ends.
Quiz results should clearly route back into EducationDashboard, not strand users on a results-only screen.
